msg.msg_body: In loop 'PW3_IC (../QAT-Model/pointwise.cpp:97:25)', partially UNROLL (../QAT-Model/pointwise.cpp:98:1) is converted into complete unroll due to PIPELINE pragma above (../QAT-Model/pointwise.cpp:95:1) as a pipelined region cannot contain loops that are not fully unrolled
